pi_items.source: Task instructions and verifier.py logic explicitly target this file path.
Task instructions and verifier.py logic explicitly target this file path.
Task instructions and verifier.py logic explicitly target this file path.
Task instructions require 25 rows (circles) in both CSV files, and verifier.py strictly enforces len(rows) == 25.
Task instructions specify 5 routines, and verifier.py comments specify 'Needs at least instructions, part a, transition, part b' (4 routines).

privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating a synthetic PsychoPy experiment at '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/trail_making_test.psyexp' and two condition CSV files ('tmt_part_a.csv' and 'tmt_part_b.csv') in the 'conditions' subdirectory. Each CSV must contain exactly 25 rows representing the target circles. The experiment must contain a minimum of 4 routines (e.g., instructions, part A, transition, part B).
